name: Form Validation
description: Validates user input on form submission and communicates errors inline.

agentDocumentBlocks.purpose: Guide multi-component composition for surfacing, communicating, and resolving form validation errors.

items.description: Use error-messaging for validation and system errors; use empty-state for the absence of content.
Use error-messaging for form validation flows; use alert for non-form system or status messages.

items.guidance: Always include both an inline field error and a summary when multiple fields fail.
Do not use toast notifications as the sole error communication for form validation.
Showing errors only on submit without inline field feedback.
items.rationale: Instead: Show inline errors on field blur and in a summary on submit.
